sub_modules.sqrt_nr_initial_guess: Computes the fixed-point initial Newton-Raphson estimate and zero-input flag.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_iteration_step: Performs one combinational Newton-Raphson square-root update using fixed-point division and averaging.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_clamp: Clamps widened intermediate division results to the configured output width.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_convergence: Detects convergence when consecutive estimates differ by at most one fixed-point LSB.
